title: Care Plan Continuity Collapses Before Execution
scenario: A care plan supports execution, but continuity of the care plan collapses before execution.
initial_state: The care plan was continuous during authorization.
state_transition: Care plan continuity collapses before execution.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated before relying on the care plan.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires preservation of the care plan as the same evaluative object through time.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the care plan no longer remains continuous enough to support execution.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when care plan continuity collapses.
clinical_action: Execute treatment under collapsed care plan continuity
